controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm-first verify/repair with deterministic temporal-candidate hints and v1.1 candidate-gated repair guards

hypothesis: Full-validation arm V1 (cand_prose_expanded_builders_vr_v1): expanded deterministic temporal-candidate builders bundled into g3_candidates_extract_repair verify-repair. Tests whether VR adds or subtracts vs F0 adjudicate-only (68.1% monthly) under shared expanded builder surface.
metric_caveats: Comparison group gan_s0_expanded_builders_vr_gpt_full_validation_v1; paired read vs F0 runs/gan_s0_expanded_builders_prose_full_validation_gpt4_1_mini_20260521T073432Z (68.1% monthly) and pre-expansion VR anchor runs/gan_s0_gpt4_1_mini_temporal_candidates_verify_repair_full_validation_guardrails_20260520T130933Z (65.1% monthly).
Expanded builders activated in temporal_candidates.py (post-2026-05-21); same program/prompt IDs as frozen VR anchor.
Two LLM calls per record; latency not comparable to F0 single-pass.
